run_summary.summary: ⚠️ Brandi couldn't run today — Gmail access is broken. The OAuth refresh token returned an 'invalid_grant' error, which usually means the token has been revoked or expired. No emails were scanned and no deals were updated. To fix: go to your Google Account > Security > Third-party apps, find the Brand Deal Tracker / Brandi connection, and reconnect it. Then update the refresh token in the session config.
run_summary.error: Gmail OAuth token refresh failed: invalid_grant (Bad Request). Refresh token may be expired or revoked.

suggestions.message: Gmail OAuth is broken — Brandi can't scan emails until you reconnect. Visit Google Account > Security > Third-party apps to reauthorize, then update the refresh token in Brandi's config.
